description: Welcome to Windsor Gate! Rarely available bright 3-level, 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom townhome in a quiet, gated community offering comfort, privacy, and convenience. The main floor features an open-concept living and dining area with a cozy gas fireplace, a large kitchen that opens to the front patio, and a private fenced backyard—perfect for kids, pets, or entertaining. The second level includes two spacious bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a laundry room.  The top floor boasts a private primary suite with a walk-in closet, ensuite, and its own balcony with peaceful forest views. Enjoy both a gated front entrance and backyard in a well-maintained complex located in an amazing neighbourhood—just a 10-minute walk to SkyTrain
